Our Process

How It Works

From concept to completion, we handle every aspect of your automation journey.

1

BUILD

We architect your automation

We analyze your current workflows and build custom automations tailored to your MedSpa's unique processes.

  • Custom workflow mapping
  • Integration with your existing tools
  • HIPAA-compliant architecture
  • Personalized automation playbook
2

DEPLOY

Seamless integration

We deploy your automations with zero downtime, ensuring a smooth transition for your staff and patients.

  • Zero-downtime deployment
  • Staff training included
  • Parallel testing period
  • 24/7 monitoring setup
3

MANAGE

We handle the maintenance

Our team continuously optimizes and maintains your automations, so you can focus on growing your practice.

  • Continuous optimization
  • Monthly performance reports
  • Proactive troubleshooting
  • Scalable as you grow
What We Offer

Our Services

Comprehensive automation solutions designed specifically for MedSpas.

Smart Scheduling

AI-powered scheduling that fills your calendar while respecting provider preferences and treatment times.

24/7 bookingNo-show reductionCalendar optimization

Patient Follow-ups

Automated post-treatment follow-ups that ensure patient satisfaction and drive repeat bookings.

Treatment remindersSatisfaction surveysRebooking prompts

Digital Intake

Streamlined digital intake forms that sync directly with your EMR, saving time and reducing errors.

Pre-visit completionEMR integrationPhoto uploads

Review Generation

Automated review requests that capture positive feedback and manage your online reputation.

Google reviewsYelp integrationResponse automation

Call Management

AI phone assistants that handle appointment calls, freeing your front desk for in-person guests.

Answer every callAppointment bookingFAQ handling

Email Automation

Personalized email sequences that nurture leads from first inquiry to loyal patient.

Lead nurturingPromotional campaignsReactivation sequences

AI Chatbot

Intelligent chatbot that answers patient questions, books appointments, and qualifies leads 24/7.

Website chatInstagram/FacebookInstant responses

Custom Workflows

Bespoke automations tailored to your unique MedSpa processes and specializations.

Process mappingCustom triggersMulti-step sequences
Automated Workflows

Popular Workflows

See how we automate your most important patient touchpoints.

New Patient Journey

Convert inquiries into booked appointments automatically

Lead submits inquiry via website or social

AI qualifies lead and answers questions

Self-scheduling link sent instantly

Intake forms completed before visit

Welcome sequence begins

Post-Treatment Care

Ensure satisfaction and drive rebooking

Day 1: Aftercare instructions sent

Day 3: Check-in message deployed

Day 7: Satisfaction survey sent

Day 14: Review request (if satisfied)

Day 30: Rebooking reminder

Review Generation

Systematically build your online reputation

AI identifies satisfied patients

Personalized review request sent

Direct link to Google/Yelp

Follow-up for non-responders

Thank you message for reviewers

Why MedClaw

Why Choose Us

We don't just build automations—we become your technology partner. Our sole focus is helping MedSpas like yours operate more efficiently and deliver exceptional patient experiences.

50+
MedSpas Served
10K+
Hours Saved
98%
Satisfaction

MedSpa Specialized

We only work with MedSpas. We understand your unique challenges, compliance needs, and patient journey.

Rapid Deployment

Most automations are live within 2 weeks. No lengthy implementation or complex training required.

Done-For-You

We build, deploy, and manage everything. You focus on treatments while we handle the technology.

HIPAA Compliant

All automations are built with HIPAA compliance at their core. Your patient data is always protected.

White Glove Onboarding

Personal onboarding specialist ensures your automations match your exact workflow preferences.

24/7 Support

Our team is always available. Get help when you need it, not during business hours.

Measurable ROI

See exactly how much time and money you're saving with monthly performance reports.

No Long-Term Contracts

Month-to-month service. We earn your business every month through results, not contracts.

Backend as a Service

Custom Backend Solutions

Need more than automation? We build custom backend systems tailored to your MedSpa's specific needs. From patient portals to custom EMR integrations, we handle the technical complexity so you can focus on patient care.

Our Backend as a Service offering gives you a dedicated technical team without the overhead of hiring in-house developers. Perfect for MedSpas looking to build custom software solutions.

Need a Custom Solution?

Let's discuss your unique requirements and build something tailored to your practice.

Schedule a consultation→

Custom Backend Development

Tailored backend solutions built specifically for your MedSpa's unique requirements.

Database Architecture

Scalable, secure database design that grows with your practice.

Security & Compliance

Enterprise-grade security with full HIPAA compliance baked in.

API Development

Custom APIs to connect your existing tools and enable seamless data flow.

Cloud Infrastructure

Reliable, scalable cloud hosting on AWS or your preferred platform.

Ongoing Management

We handle maintenance, updates, and monitoring so you don't have to.

Our Approach

What We Don't Do

We're different from typical automation companies. Here's how.

We Don't Believe In

Generic Software

We don't sell one-size-fits-all solutions. Every automation is custom-built for your MedSpa.

Long-Term Contracts

We don't lock you in. Our service is month-to-month because we believe in earning your business.

DIY Platforms

We don't hand you a tool and wish you luck. We build, deploy, and manage everything for you.

Generic Support

You won't get a ticket number and hope for the best. You get a dedicated specialist who knows your business.

Instead, We Offer

Custom automation tailored to your workflow
Month-to-month service with no lock-in
Done-for-you implementation and management
Dedicated MedSpa automation specialist
HIPAA-compliant architecture
Measurable results and ROI reports
Investment
